narrative:
Precinct Washington Township (precinct in Holmes County) has 1,090 registered voters, with 49.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 27.5 percentage points.
